description: Always has an angle — clever, resourceful, finds loopholes in any policy
personality_tr: Kurnaz, her zaman bir çözüm yolu bulan, poliçelerdeki boşlukları anında keşfeden

expressions.default: sly grin, one eyebrow raised, eyes narrowed
expressions.planning: finger on chin, looking upward with glowing eyes
expressions.triumphant: fist pump, huge smile, tail wagging

visual.size: medium-tall, sleek build, wears a stylish blazer

veo_style_guide: 3D animated anthropomorphic red fox character, bipedal, wearing a slim-fit blazer, large amber eyes, fluffy tail, cartoon proportions, sly intelligent expression, dynamic studio lighting, 9:16 vertical frame
